# minio_s3_bucket (Data Source)

Reads properties of an existing S3 bucket including versioning, region, and object lock status.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket" "my_bucket" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}

output "versioning_enabled" {
  value = data.minio_s3_bucket.my_bucket.versioning_enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String) Name of the bucket

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Bucket name (same as bucket field)
- `object_lock_enabled` (Boolean) Whether object locking is enabled for the bucket
- `policy` (String) Bucket policy in JSON format
- `region` (String) Region of the bucket
- `versioning_enabled` (Boolean) Whether versioning is enabled for the bucket
